title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF LIBOG, PROVINCE OF ALBAY, TO MUNICIPALITY OF STO. DOMINGO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 554 / 55 OG No. 37, 7894 (September 14, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2520, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF LIBOG, PROVINCE OF ALBAY, TO MUNICIPALITY OF STO. DOMINGO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Municipality of Libog, Province of Albay, shall hereafter be known as the Municipality of Sto. Domingo.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
